data.title: Abraxas Capital's Heka fund deposited 2038 BTC into Kraken two hours ago.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, about two hours ago, the Heka Fund, a subsidiary of Abraxas Capital, marked an address to deposit 2,038 BTC, worth approximately $168.21 million, into the cryptocurrency exchange Kraken. Subsequently, the same address deposited 15 million USDC into the Morpho address.

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin panic is rising, but buying pressure may return after the selling pressure subsides.
data.description: Santiment, an on-chain data analytics platform, revealed that the proportion of panic discussions about Bitcoin on social media has risen to its highest level since 2026, while market sentiment indicators have fallen to their lowest point since November of last year, with the overall atmosphere shifting from cautious to clearly panicked. The market is currently in a de-risking phase, with stocks and precious metals experiencing corrections after previous gains. The contraction of cross-market liquidity and the cooling of leveraged funds may continue to influence the cryptocurrency market. However, a sharp deterioration in sentiment often approaches a phase of "capitulation selling," where long-term funds typically choose to buy at lower levels as retail investors exit under pressure. If Bitcoin prices gradually stabilize, the current pessimistic sentiment may quickly reverse and drive subsequent buying back in. Analysis indicates that if macroeconomic market volatility continues, or if Bitcoin fails to recover key price levels watched by traders, panic may persist for several days, and the short-term trend may remain volatile. (CoinDesk)

data.title: An ETH whale urgently deposited 2 million USDC with Hyperliquid to avoid liquidation.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, an ETH whale urgently deposited 2 million USDC into Hyperliquid to avoid liquidation. The whale currently holds 20,000 ETH, worth $50.82 million, with a liquidation price of $1,994.24.

data.title: Understanding the Peak of Happiness During Festive Seasons
data.description: Crypto KOL @roger73005305 posted on X. People often experience the greatest happiness when they are on the verge of achieving it, similar to the anticipation felt on Friday afternoons compared to Sunday evenings. The true essence of celebrating the New Year lies in the days leading up to it, during the journey home, shopping for festive goods with family, and the night before New Year's Eve. Once the New Year has passed, the sense of happiness tends to diminish.

data.title: Huang Licheng Faces Significant Losses in ETH and HYPE Trades
data.description:
On January 31, Huang Licheng, also known as 'Brother Machi,' experienced a complete liquidation of his ETH and HYPE long positions, resulting in a loss of approximately $210,000. According to BlockBeats, this adds to a total loss of $1.57 million recorded over the past week.

Following the liquidation, Huang promptly reopened a position, initiating a $510,000 ETH long position at an opening price of $2,533.72.

data.title: High Leverage ETH Position Opened by Investor
data.description: Hyperbot data reveals that a prominent investor has opened a 25x leverage long position on Ethereum. According to Odaily, the current position holds 200 ETH with a liquidation price set at $2,471.
